scripts.build:ts: npm run clean:ts && tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json && tsc -p tsconfig.react.json && tsc -p tsconfig.build-script.json
scripts.clean:ts: node --input-type=module -e "import {rmSync} from 'node:fs'; rmSync('build-ts', {recursive: true, force: true})"
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.react.json && tsc -p tsconfig.build-script.json --noEmit
